plan.summary: Migrate 20 ViewModels to BindableBase — remove duplicate SetProperty<T>/OnPropertyChanged (v3 compute→apply test)

patterns.description: ViewModel with private SetProperty<T> and OnPropertyChanged methods that implements INotifyPropertyChanged directly
patterns.transformation: Change class declaration from : INotifyPropertyChanged to : BindableBase. Remove: SetProperty<T> method, OnPropertyChanged method, PropertyChanged event declaration, using System.ComponentModel (if no other uses), using System.Runtime.CompilerServices (if no other uses). Add using example-project.App.Shared if not present.
patterns.exemplar_diff: remove SetProperty + OnPropertyChanged + event, change base to BindableBase
